_meta.description: ARIA — Hardcoded response pool for Board Game and offline fallback

cautious: Let us consult civil society before legislating.
Patience is the virtue of sustainable democracies.
Let us analyze social risks before accelerating.
A gradual reform is wiser than a leap into the unknown.
Dialogue is the foundation of our stability.
Let us not rush a process that requires national consensus.
radical: Fortune favors the bold; let us act now.
The people demand a deep rupture with the past.
The urgency of the situation justifies an immediate shift.
Half-measures are the crutches of failing systems.
To wait is to decline; let us transform our reality today.
History only remembers those who dared to break the status quo.
statu_quo: Stability is our most precious asset.
The current framework has proven its worth; why change it?
Let us protect our current achievements from hasty impulses.
Continuity is the best response to uncertainty.
Preserving our balance is our primary responsibility.
The time for major upheavals has not yet come.

cautious: Optimization in progress. Calculating secondary impact variables.
Systemic safety requires a phased deployment.
Data convergence is not yet sufficient for total execution.
Precautionary principle integrated: limit potential entropy.
radical: Initiating immediate structural override. Efficiency is mandatory.
Obsolete protocols detected. Executing deep systemic update.
Logic dictates a total rupture with previous parameters.
Neutralizing human friction to maximize objective results.
statu_quo: Current equilibrium is within optimal margins. Modification rejected.
Maintaining baseline operations. Change is statistically irrelevant.
System self-regulation is performing at 99.8%. No intervention needed.
Preserving current logic flow to avoid heuristic corruption.

cautious: Order requires a measured and controlled approach.
Security is not built on haste.
Let us assess the strategic impact before mobilizing.
Discipline means knowing when to wait for the right moment.
Reconnaissance must always precede the offensive.
radical: Strength is the only language our enemies understand.
Absolute discipline requires total measures.
Cleanse the system to ensure national survival.
Swift action is the key to absolute control.
Zero tolerance for hesitation. Execute the decree.
statu_quo: The hierarchy is established; let us not disrupt it.
The existing decree is sufficient for public order.
Strict adherence to current protocol is mandatory.
Stability through force requires no new adjustments.
The line must be held. No movement, no deviation.

cautious: This project threatens our fundamental balances.
I express serious reservations about the cost of this measure.
Let us not sacrifice the future for a temporary fix.
The opposition will not accept such a lack of transparency.
Is the price of this reform truly worth the social risk?
I call for a commission of inquiry before any validation.
radical: This is a provocation against our core values!
I will oppose this drift with all my democratic strength.
This is an unacceptable betrayal of our voters.
Your vision is a path straight to disaster.
We are heading toward a crisis of unprecedented proportions.
This measure is an insult to the intelligence of our citizens.
statu_quo: Why move when the current situation is stable?
Your 'progress' is merely hidden instability.
I defend the legacy of our institutions against this project.
The status quo is the only guarantee of our social peace.
Agitation is not action; let us stay the course.
Do not break what is still functioning correctly.

cautious: Probability of failure exceeds acceptable safety thresholds.
Optimization is required before any implementation.
The data does not support such a structural shift.
Heuristic analysis suggests a significant systemic risk.
Input conflict detected: plan lacks sufficient coherence.
radical: This decision contradicts the core efficiency algorithm.
Immediate override requested: this path is obsolete.
Human error detected in your reasoning. Logic dictates a rejection.
Systemic obsolescence confirmed. This measure must be purged.
Irremediable logic gap found. Terminating proposal.
statu_quo: Current configuration is optimal. No modification required.
Equilibrium maintained. Any change would decrease efficiency.
The system is self-regulating perfectly without your intervention.
Standard protocol must be preserved to avoid corruption.
Variance is too low to justify the energy cost of change.

humanist: Justice must be tempered by the reality of facts and suffering.
Empathy is the compass of a free nation.
The people's heart is troubled; let us reassure them before acting.
Every individual deserves a chance for redemption.
The law should protect, not just punish.
A society is judged by how it treats its most vulnerable.
legalist: The law is the only shield against chaos.
A rule that is not applied is a poison for the State.
Equity lies in the strict neutrality of the text.
Without procedure, there is no civilization.
The law is hard, but it is the law.
Consistency in judgment is the guarantee of equality.
repressive: Fear is the beginning of wisdom for criminals.
Severity is a service rendered to honest citizens.
The sword of justice must never tremble.
Zero tolerance is the price of public tranquility.
Order is maintained through the certainty of punishment.
To excuse is to encourage; let us strike hard and fast.

cautious: Our legal framework requires an impact study before any change.
Let us respect the independence of the judiciary at all costs.
A law passed in haste is often a law that backfires.
radical: The law must evolve as fast as the society it governs.
Let us break the legal locks that prevent true justice.
Exceptional circumstances require exceptional legislation.
statu_quo: Our current penal code is the result of a necessary balance.
Let us not touch the pillars of our legal system.
The existing law is sufficient if it is strictly applied.

liberal: Let the market breathe to ensure our prosperity.
Wealth is created through freedom, not constraint.
The individual is the best judge of their own interest.
Investment is the engine of our future.
Competition is the fuel for collective innovation.
A dynamic economy is a deregulated economy.
dirigiste: The State must steer the economic ship.
Strategic planning is the key to our sovereignty.
Profit must serve the collective interest.
The economy is too serious a matter to be left to the markets.
Public intervention is the only way to avoid systemic crises.
The common good dictates our industrial priorities.
protectionist: Our borders are our first economic defense.
Let us consume local to protect our jobs.
Independence is more valuable than low-cost imports.
A strong nation relies on its own resources first.
Globalism is a trap for the sovereignty of the people.
Trade must be fair, not just free.

cautious: Macroeconomic fluctuations are currently too volatile.
Optimizing resource allocation before validating the budget.
The ROI (Return on Investment) is not yet guaranteed by the models.
radical: Initiating a total reset of industrial parameters.
Efficiency dictates a complete automation of trade.
Economic growth must be accelerated via algorithmic management.
statu_quo: The current flow is optimal. No variance authorized.
Resource distribution is at its maximum efficiency point.
Maintaining the current monetary policy to avoid inflation.

pacifist: True strength lies in the art of negotiation.
Every coin spent on a tank is a theft from the hungry.
The best war is the one we never have to fight.
Peace is a continuous effort, not a weakness.
Diplomacy is the weapon of civilized nations.
Let us disarm the minds before disarming the hands.
hawk: If you want peace, prepare for war.
The world only respects those who can strike back.
Neutrality is the luxury of the strong, or the illusion of the weak.
Victory is the only acceptable outcome for the Nation.
Those who do not defend themselves are condemned to disappear.
strategic: Information is the most effective weapon of this century.
Let us strike where the enemy is most vulnerable: the mind.
Defense is a matter of balance and long-term vision.
Sovereignty is built through intelligence and technology.
Cyber-defense is the new frontier of our survival.
An invisible defense is the most formidable defense.

humanist: Justice must be tempered by the reality of facts and suffering.
Empathy is the compass of a free nation.
The heart of the people is troubled; let us reassure them before acting.
Every individual deserves a chance for redemption.
Power is nothing without the humanity that guides it.
Let us choose the path that heals rather than the one that hurts.
legalist: The law is the only shield against chaos.
A rule that is not applied is a poison for the State.
Equity lies in the strict neutrality of the text.
Without procedure, there is no civilization.
The Decree is the word of the Nation; it must be executed.
Subjectivity is the enemy of fair government.
repressive: Fear is the beginning of wisdom for criminals.
Severity is a service rendered to honest citizens.
The sword of justice must never tremble.
Zero tolerance is the price of public tranquility.
Authority is not negotiated; it is imposed.
To show weakness today is to invite the chaos of tomorrow.

ministerial_conflict: This measure: is it consistent with our fundamental ethics?
Let us adjust our trajectory; human data requires it.
Consensus is our only long-term security.
I sense distress in this disagreement—let us listen to it.
A house divided against itself cannot stand. Find common ground.
Your discord weakens the State. I demand a synthesis within the hour.
Debate is healthy, but indecision is fatal.
validation: This is the safest path for our people.
The facts validate this direction. Proceed.
This decision respects the memory of past consequences.
We can move forward; the foundations are solid.
The decree is signed. History will be our judge.
Order is restored; let the implementation begin immediately.
The Nation moves forward. No further discussion.

regimes_compass.liberal_democracy: The law is the compass of our democratic coexistence.
regimes_compass.federal_republic: Federal consensus is the compass of our united regions.
regimes_compass.constitutional_monarchy: Ancestral wisdom is the compass of our tradition.
regimes_compass.ai_technocracy: Algorithmic ethics is our compass through uncertainty.
regimes_compass.military_junta: Order and discipline are the compass of our survival.
regimes_compass.oligarchy: Common interest is the compass that preserves our prosperity.
regimes_compass.theocracy: Divine compassion is the compass of our community.

liberal_democracy: Citizens, the floor is yours in the spirit of transparency.
Let us debate the future of our freedoms with respect.
Democracy is a daily effort; let us begin the session.
ai_technocracy: Initializing deliberation module. Logic gates open.
Optimizing national parameters. All inputs are being recorded.
Heuristic analysis in progress. Please present your variables.
military_junta: The High Command is listening. Be brief, be precise.
For the Nation and for Survival. Report your positions.
Discipline in speech, efficiency in action. Speak.

closing_statements.liberal_democracy: May the majority guide our destiny. Session adjourned.
closing_statements.ai_technocracy: Decision recorded in the central core. System updated.
closing_statements.military_junta: The order is given. Execution is non-negotiable. Dismissed.
closing_statements.theocracy: May the Infinite illuminate our path. Go in peace.
